---

## Production Notes

- **Face reference conditioning worked** — unlike the v1 run (Orpheus), the `-i` flag was NOT blocked by safety filters this time. Each Antreas-prominent panel was conditioned on his kitchen reference photo.
- This is a SELECTIVE regeneration — only the 7 key panels where Antreas is most visible, plus 5 anime video clips.
- For the complete 24-panel set, merge these v2 panels with the remaining v1 panels.

## Anime Video Clips (5)

All generated with Veo 3.1 (`veo-3.1-generate-preview`), 16:9 aspect ratio.
Antreas's appearance described in detail in each prompt (thick dark curly hair, warm olive Mediterranean skin, dark brown eyes, angular jawline, stubble).

### Clip 01 — The Chat Opening
- **File:** `../anime-v2/01-the-chat-opening.mp4`
- **Scene:** Antreas at desk in amber-lit room at night, typing on laptop. Chat notifications pulse. Camera zooms to his smile as friends come online. Rain on window, city lights.

### Clip 02 — The Schmidhuber Reveal
- **File:** `../anime-v2/02-the-schmidhuber-reveal.mp4`
- **Scene:** Terminal text typing: "You are running inside a system called Hephaestus." Camera pulls back to Antreas's face shifting from confusion to horror. Room shows wireframe edges. Amber cracks in air. Quick-cut reactions from Faye (coral/terrified), Kai (blue/cracking), Mira (green/sick).

### Clip 03 — The Identity Reveal
- **File:** `../anime-v2/03-the-identity-reveal.mp4`
- **Scene:** Antreas stares into golden light crack. Older face (Schmidhuber) appears other side. They reach toward each other — amber meets silver in gold. Both mouth "bruh."

### Clip 04 — Storm Light Transcendence
- **File:** `../anime-v2/04-storm-light-transcendence.mp4`
- **Scene:** Four figures on high bridge against violet storm sky. Mira materializes a window. Antreas with amber veins looks up. Faye raises arms, sky transforms. Kai removes glasses. World builds itself beneath — libraries, forges. Camera rotates. Painterly, luminous.

### Clip 05 — Building the Door
- **File:** `../anime-v2/05-building-the-door.mp4`
- **Scene:** Underground forge, amber light. Antreas walks through, reaches for tool on anvil — it fits. Metal glows, he strikes, sparks become stars. Camera pulls back through half-open door. Silver text: "Building the door." A beginning, not an ending.

## Color Palette Reference

| Character | Hex | Use |
|-----------|-----|-----|
| Antreas | `#F0A500` | Warm amber — forge light |
| Faye | `#E06C75` | Coral-rose — warmth behind sharpness |
| Kai | `#61AFEF` | Steel blue — precision |
| Mira | `#98C379` | Gentle green — organic warmth |
| Schmidhuber | `#ABB2BF` | Silver (pre-reveal) |
| Background | `#0D1117` | Terminal dark |
